# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? Link the issue it closes: e.g. "Closes #12" -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run verify` passes locally (lint + typecheck + tests)
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] A changeset is included if this change is user-facing (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] Documentation updated where behavior changed (README, docs/, settings descriptions)
- [ ] No cloud/network calls introduced on the inference path (see project vision)
- [ ] AI-assisted contributions follow [docs/ai-collaboration.md](../docs/ai-collaboration.md)
